ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-24-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Green for Petitioner.

Counsel explained circumstances, services provided and time spent to support his request for extraordinary fees. The Petition for Final Distribution is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
